evals.prompt: Add consistent error handling to our NestJS API. We need: a global exception filter, custom domain exceptions (ResourceNotFound, BusinessRuleViolation), correlation IDs on every response, and structured JSON logging for all errors.
evals.expected_output: Global exception filter, custom exceptions, correlation ID middleware, and structured logging

assertions.name: global_filter
assertions.description: GlobalExceptionFilter registered in main.ts with @Catch()

assertions.name: custom_exceptions
assertions.description: ResourceNotFoundException and BusinessRuleViolationException defined

assertions.name: correlation_ids
assertions.description: Middleware generates/propagates X-Correlation-ID

assertions.name: structured_logging
assertions.description: Errors logged as structured JSON with correlationId, path, status

assertions.name: consistent_format
assertions.description: All error responses have {statusCode, error, message, correlationId}

evals.prompt: Add retry logic with exponential backoff for our external API calls. We call Stripe, SendGrid, and a third-party shipping API. Each can fail temporarily. Don't retry on 4xx errors (client errors), only on 5xx and network timeouts.
evals.expected_output: Retry utility with backoff, jitter, retry-only-on-server-errors logic

assertions.name: exponential_backoff
assertions.description: Delay increases exponentially between retries

assertions.name: jitter
assertions.description: Random jitter added to prevent thundering herd

assertions.name: retryable_check
assertions.description: Only retries 5xx and network errors, not 4xx

assertions.name: max_attempts
assertions.description: Configurable max retry attempts

assertions.name: reusable
assertions.description: Single retry utility used for all 3 services

evals.prompt: Implement a circuit breaker for our microservice that calls the AI inference service. When the AI service is down, requests should fail fast instead of timing out. After 30 seconds, try one request to see if it's back.
evals.expected_output: Circuit breaker with CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN states, configurable threshold and timeout

assertions.name: three_states
assertions.description: CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN states implemented

assertions.name: failure_threshold
assertions.description: Opens after N consecutive failures

assertions.name: reset_timeout
assertions.description: Transitions to HALF_OPEN after 30 seconds

assertions.name: fast_fail
assertions.description: Returns error immediately when OPEN (no waiting for timeout)

assertions.name: auto_recovery
assertions.description: Returns to CLOSED after successful HALF_OPEN request

evals.prompt: Add error handling to our React app. Need: ErrorBoundary at the route level, toast notifications for API errors, retry buttons on failed data fetches, and a global error event handler for unhandled rejections.
evals.expected_output: React error handling with ErrorBoundary, toast notifications, retry UI, and global handler

assertions.name: error_boundary
assertions.description: ErrorBoundary component wrapping route-level content

assertions.name: toast_notifications
assertions.description: API errors shown as toast notifications

assertions.name: retry_button
assertions.description: Failed data fetches show retry button

assertions.name: unhandled_rejection
assertions.description: window.addEventListener for unhandledrejection

assertions.name: user_friendly
assertions.description: Error messages are user-friendly, not stack traces

evals.prompt: Set up error handling for our Django REST Framework API. Need: custom exception handler, consistent error format matching our NestJS services, correlation IDs, and proper handling of Django ValidationError vs DRF exceptions.
evals.expected_output: DRF exception handler with consistent format, correlation IDs, and validation error handling

assertions.name: custom_handler
assertions.description: Custom exception handler registered in REST_FRAMEWORK settings

assertions.name: consistent_format
assertions.description: Response matches NestJS format: {statusCode, error, message, correlationId}

assertions.name: correlation_id
assertions.description: X-Correlation-ID from request or generated UUID

assertions.name: validation_errors
assertions.description: Django ValidationError converted to structured field errors

assertions.name: unhandled_catch
assertions.description: Unhandled exceptions return 500 with generic message, not stack trace
